description_long: This is a round ceramic plate with a decorative rim featuring a repeating pattern of five-pointed stars. The central area of the plate displays a sepia-toned portrait of a bearded man in formal attire, possibly a historical figure, with a signature or inscription beneath the image. The plate's surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with a shallow concave shape typical of dinnerware. The back of the plate is plain, with a slightly raised foot ring for stability. The overall color is an off-white or cream, with brownish decorative elements and some minor discoloration or wear visible on the reverse side.
description: A round ceramic plate with a star-patterned rim and a sepia portrait of a bearded man in the center, finished in off-white and brown tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the star-patterned rim, central portrait, and signature.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the plate's shallow concave shape and thickness.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the plain, off-white surface and raised foot ring.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the plate's thin, slightly curved form.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative star pattern on rim, sepia portrait and signature in center front.
